career_angle: If you're building AI products, these micro-data marketplaces (Kled AI, Silencio, Neon Mobile) are where training data is heading -- learn their APIs and data formats now. For ML engineers, understanding provenance and consent chains in crowdsourced training data is becoming a compliance-critical skill.
